title: Builders & Construction
subtitle: The hands that raise the walls

pages.text: The &6Builder&r is the worker who turns a planned design into a standing structure. Where you lay out a wall or other build, builders carry materials and place blocks until the blueprint is complete.
Builders place exactly what the design specifies. The server bakes the connections into the blueprint, so a built wall looks as intended without you correcting block shapes by hand.
A builder needs materials in reach. Keep their drop-off and supply storage stocked with the bricks and blocks the design calls for, or construction stalls waiting on parts.
